user_goal: 在 B015 done 之后做 B010 risk parity HRP 升级（BL-B010-S3）：给 RiskParityParameters 加 weighting_method Literal['inverse_volatility', 'hrp']（默认 inverse_volatility，B010 signoff 行为 bit-for-bit 保留），新增 pure-stdlib HRP 算法模块（De Prado 2016：correlation → distance → single-linkage clustering → quasi-diagonalize → recursive bisection；无 scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn）；B010 backtest workflow dispatch；在 B014 真实 snapshot 上对比 HRP vs inverse-vol vs static 60/40，看 HRP 是否缩窄 B014 cross-strategy 发现的 absolute-return gap。**不修改 B011/B012/B013/B014/B015 strategy code**；B011 master portfolio risk_parity sleeve 默认走 inverse-vol 自动保持 invariants。保留 fixture/mock-first 默认 CI、no-live/no-secret-in-strategy/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-14 B016 planning: B015 done wrap-up confirmed (6/6 PASS); user selected BL-B010-S3 HRP upgrade as next batch direction. Rationale: B010 plain inverse-vol is reused as B011 master portfolio risk_parity sleeve and B013 L2 engine; upgrading once benefits multiple downstream paths. arxiv 2026 research material (Beyond De Prado and Cotton, Hierarchical Min Variance, Topological RP) strongly supports HRP variants over plain inverse-vol on out-of-sample Sharpe + drawdown + stability. Plus the B014 cross-strategy finding (B010 underperformed static 60/40 by ~25pp in 2020-06..2022-12) motivates testing whether correlation-aware HRP closes some of that gap on the same real snapshot. Project constraint check: trade/ modules are pure-stdlib zero-third-party-deps (only yfinance, in scripts/ only). HRP must be implemented in pure stdlib (math + statistics + dataclasses + typing) — no scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn. Small algorithm, ~200 lines, reviewable. Decisions captured: (1) weighting_method tightened from free str to Literal['inverse_volatility', 'hrp'] with default 'inverse_volatility'; (2) HRP lives in new trade/strategies/risk_parity_hrp.py; (3) B010 workflow dispatches based on policy; (4) comparative backtest harness reuses B014 snapshot + sidecar baseline; (5) default must reproduce B010 signoff bit-for-bit (backwards-compat hard requirement); (6) B011/B012/B013/B014/B015 strategy code untouched; (7) no scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn imports anywhere. Wrote B016 spec and features.json (6 features: F001-F005 generator + F006 codex; mixed batch). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-14 B016 F001-F004 done. F001: weighting_method Literal + __post_init__ validation. F002: pure-stdlib HRP module + 39 unit tests. F003: B010 workflow dispatcher (HRP path via _hrp_risk_asset_weights using same lookback) + 'weighting_method' in rebalance_trace dict entries + 10 workflow tests. F004: trade/strategies/risk_parity_hrp_comparison.py — single module hosts (a) the harness (run_hrp_comparison runs both ORDERED_METHODS via dataclasses.replace on the strategy template, then build_monthly_signal_dates / load_hrp_snapshot_records / try_run_real_snapshot_hrp_comparison provide the B014 manifest path with graceful 'skipped' fallback), (b) the static 60/40 baseline loader (load_static_60_40_baseline reads B014 sidecar's comparison.strategies.static_60_40, strips equity_curve, returns {} on any failure for robust fallback), and (c) the report payload + Markdown renderer (build_hrp_comparison_payload + render_hrp_comparison_markdown + generate_hrp_comparison_report). Pattern modelled on B015 activation_policy_comparison/report.py but with two methods instead of three policies. Pure stdlib (csv/json/math/dataclasses) + reuse of trade.backtest.risk_parity, trade.strategies.risk_parity, trade.data.loader.PriceBar — no scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn/networkx. scripts/generate_b016_hrp_comparison_report.py — CLI mirrors generate_b015_activation_policy_report.py: argparse with manifest-path/output-dir/b014-comparison-path/run-id/report-date; tries real snapshot first, falls back to synthetic if manifest absent. Smoke-tested locally: produces 'skipped' status + valid JSON+MD when manifest missing. Canonical artifact docs/test-reports/B016-risk-parity-hrp-comparison-2026-05-14.{md,json} committed. 15 new tests in tests/unit/test_risk_parity_hrp_comparison.py: both-methods-on-synthetic-universe, per-method weight-history schema, methods diverge, skipped-when-missing-manifest, payload skipped narrative, fixture-stub manifest end-to-end ran semantics, full JSON+MD artifact generation, narrative status=ran with both methods + baseline, narrative shrunk verdict using HRPComparisonResult stub with controlled ending values, sidecar loader empty-on-missing / empty-on-malformed / strips-equity-curve, markdown required-sections + no forbidden execution phrasing, markdown skipped-status visible, invalid weighting_method on template rejected at construction. Full sweep: 508 tests PASS, mypy strict clean, ruff clean, compileall clean. Next: F005 backwards-compat snapshot + safety guard regression.
